fields.Name: YourMembership - Get Member
fields.Description: Retrieves a single Member record from YourMembership by its external ID

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The unique ID of the Member record to retrieve

fields.Name: Record
fields.Description: The retrieved Member record with all fields

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the retrieved record

fields.Name: LastUpdated
fields.Description: When the member record was last updated

fields.Name: YourMembership - Search Member
fields.Description: Searches for Member records in YourMembership matching the given field filters

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100)

fields.Name: LastUpdated
fields.Description: When the member record was last updated

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist

fields.Name: YourMembership - List Member
fields.Description: Lists Member records from YourMembership with cursor-based pagination

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return per page (default: 100)

fields.Name: Cursor
fields.Description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page (from previous ListResult)

fields.Name: Records
fields.Description: Array of Member records in this page

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist

fields.Name: NextCursor
fields.Description: Cursor to pass for the next page

fields.Name: TotalCount
fields.Description: Total number of records, if known
